text_block_list.text:
Today is the Fan Fest, and Tracen Academy is
bustling with activity.
Meanwhile, over on the training track...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship, you've been doing great on "Name
That Sound!" You're down to your final three
sounds now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Are you ready? Here comes the next one!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I got this! Gimme your best shot!
Plip...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
That's a cinch! It's a tadpole jumping out of the
water!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I can't believe it... That's correct!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You figured that out at warp speed! Incredible!
Now, on to the next sound!
Trrrum...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Drip...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Too bad, 'cause I know exactly what that is! It's
morning dew on grass!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Unbelievable! Not only was that right, you got it in no time! Just how good are you, Golshi?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! You're gonna have to try harder than that
if you want to stump me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Bold words! Let's move onto the final sound!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Answer correctly, and the championship belt is
yours! Now, ready your ears!
Tock, tock, tock.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hm? Strange...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Look at this, folks! Golshi's got her brows
furrowed! Has she finally met her match?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Nah, it's not that...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It's obviously the sound of a woodblock fish.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What's bothering me is... its life force.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Its, uh, life force?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Each sound until this point felt so alive.
They were filled with vitality.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: ...But not that poor fish.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I don't feel a thing from it! It has no life, strength,
or passion. There's not even the slightest hint that
it's alive!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: It's as empty as the dried-out husk of a dead tree!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Hey, whoever's working behind the scenes! Yeah,
you! Are you just going through the motions back
there?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Get with the program, ya slacker! That's a temple
woodblock you're sounding, so treat the fish with
more respect and put some life into it!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I bet you didn't know, but if struck with enough
heart and soul, even a wooden fish can take to
the water and swim!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Um, I thought this was a quiz show... What
happened?

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Did they just decide to change directions with it
halfway? What is it now, a play?

This is no act. Gold Ship is genuinely angry, and
over the treatment of a woodblock of all things!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm so done with this quiz! Shut the whole thing
down! Show's over!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Bring that wooden fish over to me right now! I'll show you what raging passion sounds like!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hey! You can't go back there!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: RAAAH! Here comes my fishblock solooo!

Gold Ship holds it proudly and begins striking it
so fast, her movements are a blur...

It plays as lively as a taiko drum performance,
thanks to her expert strikes.

The ripples of energy flowing from the woodblock
is just like that of a fish slipping through the
water!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: I-is that Gold Ship?!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: I heard she was special, but wow...

I can't tell if the audience is impressed by Gold
Ship's performance or simply overwhelmed.
Either way, the atmosphere here is electric!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: I'm not done yet! Let's go!

She sets up a whole call and response set with the
audience while keeping up her intense show.

Many people comment on how baffled they are
by what they're witnessing, but they seem pleased
by the show all the same.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Amazing... Gold Ship is awesome!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text: So this is what it means to steal the show!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hmmm? That sound... Could it be a wooden fish?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's being played with such vigor! I feel my virtue
rising just by listening to it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Haiya, woiya, hoppity-rag! Whether cedar, fir, or
sequoia, whatever you're made of fits like a
jigsaw!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
...Hm? Is it just me, or are those some pretty sick
beats coming from the stands?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaaa! Just listen to all this! There's so much
excitement in the air!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! You know I've got to join in on my air
guitar!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Fukukitaru! Tickezo! You two are the best!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for the great vibes! Come on down and
rock out with me!

Before long, the sound of the wooden fish,
rhythmic chanting, and improv air guitar sound
effects echo throughout the track.

And throughout the whole thing, the audience
doesn't miss a beat playing their part.

This event eventually goes down in Tracen
Academy lore as "The Day the Wooden Fish
Rocked Out."
